name: embeddedknowledge
description: EmbeddedKnowledge landing page and Premed curriculum

scripts.site:build: node scripts/build-syllabus-page.mjs && node scripts/build-lesson-index.mjs && node scripts/build-lesson-specimen.mjs && node scripts/build-premed-progress.mjs && node scripts/build-agent-skills.mjs && node scripts/build-agent-context.mjs
scripts.agent:validate: npm run skills:validate && node scripts/validate-agent-protocol.mjs && node scripts/validate-lessons.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run site:build && node --check site/app.js && node --check site/syllabus.js && node --check site/graph.js && node --check site/progress.js && node --check site/lessons.js && node --check site/lesson-reader.js && node --check site/contribute.js && node --check site/webmcp.js && node --check scripts/render-lesson-format.mjs && node --check scripts/build-lesson-specimen.mjs && node --check scripts/build-premed-progress.mjs && node --check scripts/build-agent-skills.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-agent-skills.mjs && node --check scripts/fetch-open-lesson-prs.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-lesson-pr.mjs && node --check scripts/preflight-lesson-sources.mjs && node --check scripts/prepare-review-submission.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-lesson.mjs && node --check scripts/stamp-agent-provenance.mjs && node --check scripts/submit-pinned-review.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-review-comment.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-pr-review-provenance.mjs && npm run graph:validate && npm run progress:validate && npm run lesson:validate && npm run copy:validate && npm run agent:validate
scripts.test:container: docker compose up -d --build && EK_CONTAINER_BASE=${EK_CONTAINER_BASE:-http://127.0.0.1:8082} playwright test tests/container-csp.spec.js
